name: Very Very Soon - Nie Meer Baie Lank
chorusText:
We are going to see our King
We are going to see our King
We are going to see our King
And praise Him Lord of all
And praise Him Lord of all
And praise Him Lord of all
And praise Him Lord of all
And praise Him Lord of all
Niemeerbaie lank
Dan gaanons Jesus sien
Dan gaanons Jesus sien
Dan gaanons Jesus sien
En loofHom as die Heer
loofHom as die Heer
loofHom as die Heer
loofHom as die Heer
En loofHom as die Heer
